choices: Your Own Series of The Care Bears
1.content:
Hello and welcome to Care a lot.
Home of The Care Bears family.

Who is the main character to be focused on or what else do you have in mind?
1.title: Welcome to the Kingdom of Caring!

info.brief_description: Join The Care Bears and Cousins in well educated adventures.
info.description:
Join the Care Bears and Cousins as they go on many adventures to make new friends and battle evil enemies.
Rules:
Keep it perfect for all ages.
Caring always triumph against the forces of Uncaring and evil.
Let every episode or story you make perfect of teaching!

Care a lot!
